info.name: CRM LMS API
info.description:
Complete API collection for CRM Learning Management System

Base URL: https://api.crm-lms.kz/api/v1

Authentication: JWT Bearer Token

Version: 1.0.0

request.description: Register a new user with invitation token
Login to the system with email and password
Refresh access token using refresh token

item.name: Admin - User Management

request.description: Admin sends invitation to new user

response.name: Error - Insufficient Permissions - 403

request.description: Get list of all users with filters

item.description: Admin endpoints for managing users, invitations, and system overview

item.name: Admin - Payment Management

request.description: Get all payment rules for courses
Create payment rule for a course

response.name: Error - Rule Already Exists - 409

request.description: Get all payments with filters (for reporting)
